name: remctl
desc: An Apple Reminders CLI for power users and AI agents. RemCTL supports all the latest Reminders features such as sections, subtasks, tags, rich links, groceries…
descFull: An Apple Reminders CLI for power users and AI agents. RemCTL supports all the latest Reminders features such as sections, subtasks, tags, rich links, groceries lists, templates, smart lists, and image attachments. (Not affiliated with Apple.)
